name: Cran-Apple Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cranberries, apples and sugar in slow cooker.
2. Place cinnamon and cloves in center of 6-inch square of cheesecloth. Pull up around sides; tie to form pouch.
3. Place the pouch in the pot. Cover and cook on LOW for 4-5 hours or until cranberries and apples are very soft.
4. Remove spice bag.
5. Puree hot fruit in blender or food processor fitted with metal blade.
6. Sprinkle with nutmeg.
